name: mhc_class_II_chr1
description: Zebrafish MHC: secondary mhc class II cluster on chr1 (DCB/DEB paralogs). Unlike tetrapods, zebrafish MHC class I and class II are unlinked and dispersed across multiple chromosomes — the canonical 'MHC region' concept does not apply. Each subfamily has 5-30 paralogs with intra-cluster identity 75-95%. High population polymorphism: >100 alleles described per locus.
